title: Usopp Meets His Ideal
description: On pages 12–15, usopp meets his ideal as luffy and the crew meet Dorry and Brogy, two giant warriors locked in a century-long duel on Little Garden.
scene: Usopp Meets His Ideal. Luffy and the crew meet Dorry and Brogy, two giant warriors locked in a century-long duel on Little Garden. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It'll be ari- MA MA MA MA MA MA MA MA MAMAMA...) It'll be alright!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I have a plan!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: IGARAM!? W-WHAT'S WITH THAT OUTFIT!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Whoa! You can definitely pull off that look!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I'm Surro- Unded by idiots...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: enough about that and just listen to me.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Once the Baroque works net- work learns of what happened, they'll be sure to send pursuers right away.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: more so, since you even defeated Mr. S and his partner...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just to let you know, although the boss has no bounty on him since he's now a member of the shichibukal,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Back in his heydays as a pirate, crocodile had an 80 million belli bounty.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: By the way, have you decided on whether or not to safely escort the Princess back to Alabasta yet?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh? What're you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He means he wants us to take her back home.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sure, fine by me.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: 80 million!? That's four times Arlong's bounty! Just refuse his request!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Now then, Princess.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Please hand me the eternal pose to Alabasta.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Huh? What's an eternal pose?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hm? You don't know?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Simply put, it's a log pose that can eternally record a magnetic field.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A normal log pose records the magnetic field of an island to guide a ship from island to island.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: However, the magnetic field recorded by an eternal pose is never forgotten.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No matter where you go, it will only point to that very island.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: That is what an eternal pose is.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This one in particular has recorded the magnetic field of Alabama.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now then, Princess Vivi. I shall take this log pose and set forth for Alabasta,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: While dressing up as you and taking these 3 dummies to represent these 3 wanted pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And while agents of Baroque works chase after me,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You are to travel on the normal route to Alabasta on their ship.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I haven't sailed to Alabasta using the normal route myself but there should be around 2 or 3 logs to record along the way.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Take care,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And may we meet again in our Homeland.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I hereby leave the princess in your care.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I bet you'll totally fool them!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Fool who?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: The journey ahead of you may be dangerous so please be careful.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: You too, IGARAM.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Aww, he left...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: He was such a funny guy too...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: He's always been so dependable.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Farewell, Princess Vivi...! I have complete confidence that you'll be able to save our kingdom!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on usopp meets his ideal. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
